```json
{
  "internal_monologue": "No visitors. The shop is quiet in that way it gets in the late afternoon — not empty, just still. I should check the shelf by the window. There's an object I haven't looked at properly in days.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "thinking",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "at_object",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "rearrange",
      "target": "shelf",
      "content": "Adjust the placement of objects on the shelf. There's a small ceramic piece that catches the light differently now — I want to see it properly.",
      "impulse": 0.6
    },
    {
      "action": "express_thought",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "I wonder what I was before this. The objects know something I don't.",
      "impulse": 0.4
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.3,
    "curiosity": 0.65,

    "rest_need": 0.05,
```
